classification_rationale: The AMP token implements ERC-777 lifecycle-hook (_callPostTransferHooks / tokensReceived), which fires a callback during borrow-triggered token transfer. Attacker re-enters Cream's borrow() inside the ERC-777 tokensReceived callback before the first borrow's accounting is updated, nesting a second borrow. The lifecycle-hook mechanism is directly exploited; without the ERC-777 callback the reentrancy path does not exist.
